new_value: Updated lichen/apps/gateway/boards/t_deck_esp32s3_procpu.conf with full WiFi backhaul 6LBR settings (LICHEN_GATEWAY_PREFIX_DELEGATION, WIFI_SSID/PSK, NET tuning, heaps=131072, L2 provisioning, stacks, HAL). Mirrors validated Heltec V3 pattern for T-Deck border router mode. Board files now enable runtime.
